description: Style Noteyork perfumes are known for its sophisticated fragrances and it's value for money. No outfit is complete without the right fragrance (be it formal or off-duty). york has a flavor for every season. Emit the aura of a fashion aware cosmo male without burning a hole in your pocket. Encased in a delectable flacon, this perfume is a wardrobe essential this summer. Product DetailsSilver Aqua by York for men comes in a glass flaconCautionDo not spray near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying on eyesSize100 ml Style NoteYork perfumes are known for its sophisticated fragrances and it's value for money.
